channel.title: Posts on Marijan Batarilo
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Marijan Batarilo

item.title: Own Your Corner of the Internet: A Developer's Guide to Permanent Online Presence
item.description: I spent a decade scattering my work across platforms and usernames. Here’s the setup that fixed it - one domain, one blog, everything else is distribution.

item.title: Developers Have Been Dying Since 2003
item.description: Every AI wave was supposed to kill developers. Every wave just raised the floor.

item.title: Shopify's March 2026 Dev Platform Update: What Actually Matters
item.description: RBAC in the Dev Dashboard, a faster Admin API, and safer CLI deploys - the highlights worth knowing.

item.title: Beyond the Badge: What I Learned Passing the Google Cloud Associate Engineer Exam
item.description: The ACE exam tests how you think, not what you memorized. How I prepared, what actually helped, and what the certification means beyond the badge.
